title: uragoga greeneana
side_effects: Uragoga greeneana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps. In excessive doses, it may also lead to dizziness, headaches, and fatigue. Additionally, improper use of uragoga greeneana may cause allergic reactions, such as hives and skin irritation, in some individuals. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential side effects.
